allow: Bash(git commit -m "Update GitHub Pages deployment to use official GitHub Actions")
Bash(git commit -m "Rebuild project with correct static export")
Bash(git commit -m "Fix GitHub Pages CSS/JS paths with basePath configuration")
Bash(git commit -m "Remove basePath to fix CSS loading on GitHub Pages")
Bash(git commit -m "Switch back to peaceiris/actions-gh-pages for deployment")
